goal: Close the unfinished A1 branch from v2 to a definitive PROMOTE/REJECT decision, then open exactly one next low-friction branch only if A1 fails promotion.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify base hours, days, thresholds, or execution logic
Nothing counts as improvement unless it passes strict additive integration, permissive integration, ownership, and cannibalization proof
Only one candidate branch open at a time; no parallel wide search
Medium-friction wave B is forbidden until A1 is closed and one low-friction branch (A2 or A3) is fully closed with no promoted candidate

slices.title: Открыть ровно одну следующую ветку (если A1 не promoted)
slices.hypothesis: If A1 was not promoted, select exactly one next low-friction branch and prepare it for clean testing — no wide search.
slices.objective: If A1 was not promoted, select exactly one next low-friction branch and prepare it for clean testing — no wide search.
success_criteria: Exactly one next branch is selected and ready for clean testing with documented rationale
evidence_requirements: Exactly one next branch is selected and ready for clean testing with documented rationale

slices.title: A2_iv_acceleration — проверка динамики IV
slices.hypothesis: Test whether IV dynamics produce a genuine new specialist-layer, with a compact feature set and strict prototype discipline.
slices.objective: Test whether IV dynamics produce a genuine new specialist-layer, with a compact feature set and strict prototype discipline.
success_criteria: Either one mature A2 prototype passes plausibility and standalone, or an honest early rejection is recorded
evidence_requirements: Either one mature A2 prototype passes plausibility and standalone, or an honest early rejection is recorded

slices.title: A3_broader_cl_transition — проверка расширенных classifier transitions
slices.hypothesis: Test whether broader classifier transitions produce a genuine new specialist-layer with grouped transition features.
slices.objective: Test whether broader classifier transitions produce a genuine new specialist-layer with grouped transition features.
success_criteria: Either one mature A3 prototype passes plausibility and standalone, or an honest early rejection is recorded
evidence_requirements: Either one mature A3 prototype passes plausibility and standalone, or an honest early rejection is recorded
